title: GOESB Benchmark Result
description: A signed, hashed result document produced by the official runner: metric values, the environment fingerprint, and the hashes of every input (profile, pack, runtime, model, configuration) that produced them.

sha256.description: Hash over the canonical profile document used for this run.
Must match the pack manifest's own sha256 (FR-3.2).

visibility.description: Copied from the pack at run time; the ingest gate (FR-7.3) only projects open+official onto public leaderboards.

sha256.description: Hash identifying the exact adapter code + pinned dependency version.
Hash of the model weights actually loaded, so a result is tied to a specific artifact, not just a name.

config_sha256.description: Hash over the fully-resolved configuration (profile.configuration + any explicit run overrides) used for this run.

environment.description: The reproducibility fingerprint captured by `goesb env` at run time. See docs/specs/environment-capture.md. Fields the platform cannot probe are present and null with a reason, never omitted.

metrics.description: Keyed by metric id (docs/specs/metrics.md). Every value required by the profile's `metrics` list must be present.

spread.description: Required whenever repeats > 1 (FR-5.3): variance must be surfaced, never hidden. Always required for latency metrics (unit 'ms'), independent of repeat count (docs/specs/metrics.md 'Reporting': never mean alone for tail latency).

per_repeat.description: Raw per-repeat values, for tolerance/drift analysis.

build_sha256.description: Hash of the signed release artifact that produced this result, where available.

payload_sha256.description: SHA-256 over the canonical JSON serialization of this document with `signature` omitted. This is what `signature.sig` signs, and what ingest re-verifies (ADR-0004).

key_id.description: Identifies the runner-embedded signing key (see ADR-0004: the key attests to a genuine unmodified runner build, not a personal/user identity).
